tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: WONDERS OF THE WORLD
tasks.text: Every year, millions of 1.1. ________ travel around the world to see famous landmarks. The Great Wall of China is one of the most 1.2. ________ structures ever created by humans. The Eiffel Tower in Paris is instantly 1.3. ________ as a symbol of France. Many ancient 1.4. ________ like the Colosseum in Rome tell us stories about 1.5. ________ events from the past. The Taj Mahal in India is known for its 1.6. ________ white marble design. The 1.7. ________ of modern landmarks is equally impressive. The Burj Khalifa holds the world record for its incredible 1.8. ________. These amazing places remind us of human creativity and skill across the centuries.
